name: progress
description: Horizontal progress bars — one row per item, percentage filled.
purpose: Use for status-tracking across multiple parallel items (project readiness, OKR progress, capacity utilization). Status colors via on-track/at-risk/blocked.

title.description: Slide heading framing the progress view.

eyebrow.description: Optional eyebrow caption above the heading.

subtitle.description: Optional plain subtitle after the heading.

rows.description: One li per item. Format: `Label — N% — status` where status is on-track / at-risk / blocked / done.

skeleton:
<!-- _class: progress -->

`H1 2026 · Phase 1 readiness`

## Phase 1 readiness, by workstream.

Snapshot taken at 14:00 UTC. Status pills tint the bar fill.

- Codebook platform `92%` `on-track`
- Operations runbook `68%` `at-risk`
- Compliance audit pack `81%` `on-track`
- SDK polyglot parity `34%` `deferred`
- Dependency dashboard `12%` `blocked`
